regime_fall.current_status: Iran faces unprecedented military pressure from three US carrier groups with explicit strike preparations targeting IRGC leadership and energy infrastructure, while severe internal divisions between negotiation-favoring civilians (Pezeshkian, Zarif, Rouhani) and hardline military commanders (Vahidi, Hatami) intensify succession uncertainty and obstruct ceasefire diplomacy despite Trump administration diplomatic overtures.
regime_fall.last_major_event: On June 16, 2026, the IDF struck Iranian regime security institutions and the Shahran oil depot near Tehran, while Iran launched approximately 30 ballistic missiles targeting Haifa in Operation True Promise III with 92% interception rates, and Supreme Leader Khamenei appointed Maj. Gen. Amir Hatami as Artesh commander emphasizing 'active deterrence.'
